response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java expertise for this junior role, has no demonstrated experience in the insurance sector or agile consulting projects, and only has basic German language skills — a critical requirement for client collaboration in Germany.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical workshops
Proven ability to work in agile environments with CI/CD and TDD practices
concerns: Minimal to no demonstrable Java experience despite role requiring Java proficiency
German language skills are only basic, failing to meet required communication standards
Overqualified and career trajectory suggests senior-level expectations, not junior role fit
